name: mova
description: Ukrainian language skills for content adaptation, copywriting review, and localization of digital product copy.

interface.shortDescription: Adapt and review Ukrainian website copy against English source.
interface.longDescription: Review and rewrite existing Ukrainian digital copy so it reads like native Ukrainian rather than a literal translation. Preserves file structure, YAML keys, and commercial intent while improving fluency.
defaultPrompt: Use $mova:content-adaptation to adapt the Ukrainian version of this website text from the English source.
Review the Ukrainian copy in <file> against the English source and flag non-idiomatic wording.
Rewrite the Ukrainian in <file> so it reads like native Ukrainian — use the English version as the meaning reference.
